CreateBlbTcpListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateBlbTcpListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateBlbTcpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three options: "RoundRobin" / "WeightLeastConn" / "Hash"; "RoundRobin" for weighted round robin, "WeightLeastConn" for weighted least connections, "Hash" for source IP hash
CreateBlbTcpListener.tcpSessionTimeout: TCP connection timeout in seconds, default 900, must be an integer between 10 and 4000
CreateBlbTcpListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
CreateBlbTcpListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval in seconds, default 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
CreateBlbTcpListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive failed health checks after which the backend server is blocked, default 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateBlbTcpListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive successful health checks after which the backend server is marked available again, default 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
